title: Verify existing implementation of groupBy utility
description: The groupBy utility function already exists at src/utils/group-by.ts with proper TypeScript types (signature: groupBy<T, K extends keyof T>(array: T[], key: K): Record<string, T[]>), named export, and JSDoc comments. The test file src/utils/group-by.test.ts covers all required cases: empty array, single item, multiple items with different key values, nested keys, plus additional edge cases (non-mutation, numeric key conversion, insertion order preservation).
existing_patterns: src/utils/retry.ts - utility module with co-located test file
